description: Product Description Serve your party drinks in charming style with these light blue paper cups. Featuring a delicate pastel blue shade, these party cups are perfect for serving warm or cold beverages to your party guests. As these cups are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Light blue cups are ideal for a christening, baby shower, first birthday, wedding and so much more.
